prompt: A Renaissance-era marble workshop with two sculptors sitting facing each other. The left sculptor chisels a marble statue of the right sculptor, while that marble statue is itself chiseling a statue of the left sculptor. Both human and marble figures caught mid-action in perfect symmetry, each creating the other in an endless loop. Marble dust in shafted sunlight, classical columns, sculpting tools scattered on floor. Photorealistic, no text, no symbols.
paradox_explanation: Two sculptors each create the other in an endless loop with no discernible starting point, mirroring self-supervised learning where a model generates its own training signal in a circular dependency.
